tasks.title: Define align-arch-decision seam schema
tasks.summary: Author tools/seams/align-arch-decision/input.schema.json + output.schema.json. Input: exploration-doc decision-log block + plan_slug. Output: 3 plan-scoped arch_decisions (slug/title/rationale/alternatives).

tasks.title: Plan-covered subagent body for seam-align-arch-decision
tasks.summary: Author .claude/agents/seam-align-arch-decision.md. Reads decision-log block + scope rules; emits 3 ratified arch_decisions per Phase A contract. Mission + Hard boundaries + Output shape only.

tasks.title: Recipify master-plan-new Phase A+B+C into YAML
tasks.summary: Author ia/recipes/master-plan-new.yaml with Phase A seam.align-arch-decision step + Phase B header step + Phase C decomposition step. Engine call sites + MCP-write step blocks.

tasks.title: Body trim master-plan-new to dispatch shell
tasks.summary: Trim .claude/agents/master-plan-new.md to recipe-dispatch shell (>=60% line drop). Recipe pointer + CLI + Hard boundaries + escape hatch + cache pointer only.
depends_on: Recipify master-plan-new Phase A+B+C into YAML

decompose_expected_output.stage_file_plan: File 4 tasks as TECH issues. Sizing: H2/H2/H3/H2. Depends-on chain: task 2 depends on task 1, task 3 on task 2, task 4 on task 3. Seam schema first (unblocks subagent body), then recipe YAML, then body trim.
